numericFacts.label: Revenue from Contract with Customer, Excluding Assessed Tax

narrativeSnippets: Final price paid per share for the purchase of the targeted number of shares, determined by an average market price over a fixed period of time.
Amount of cash receipt from (payment to) bank; or stock received from (issuance to) bank in the settlement of the accelerated share repurchase agreement.
